questions.question: Explain the convolution operation in image processing. Apply the given 3x3 averaging kernel to a sample 5x5 image region.
keyPoints: At each position, compute weighted sum
Divide by sum of kernel weights for averaging

questions.question: Compare Gaussian blur and Median filter. Which is better for salt-and-pepper noise and why?
keyPoints: Median: Replaces with middle value of sorted neighbors
Gaussian blurs the noise spots; Median removes them

questions.question: Explain morphological operations: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, and Closing with examples.
keyPoints: Include diagrams and structuring element concept

questions.question: What is histogram equalization? Explain the algorithm with a numerical example.
keyPoints: Purpose: Improve contrast by spreading intensities

questions.question: Write and explain the kernels for: (a) Mean filter (b) Sharpening filter (c) Emboss filter
